subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting, sent down in truth; yet most among mankind remain unconvinced. God, Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله المهیمن القیوم نزلت بالحق ولکن الناس اکثرهم لایوقنون الله الذی
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @idolatry
